name: kgcl-rdflib
documentation:
# kgcl-rdflib

An engine that applies changes or diffs specified in KGCL to an RDF graph stored using rdflib

## KGCL

KGCL (Knowledge Graph Change Language) is a datamodel and language for representing changes in ontologies and knowledge graphs

The core KGCL repo is here:

 - https://github.com/INCATools/kgcl
 
 This kgcl-rdflib repo applies the KGCL model to rdflib graphs.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.diff_2_kgcl_triple_annotation.generate_triple_annotation_commands
documentation:
Get differences.

Given two graphs g1 and g2,
return all (annotated) EdgeCreation and
(annotated) EdgeDeletions to account for their diff.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.diff_2_kgcl_triple_annotation.generate_triple_annotation_additions
documentation: Return EdgeCreation instances for given (added) triples.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.diff_2_kgcl_triple_annotation.generate_triple_annotation_deletions
documentation: Return EdgeDeletion instances for given (deleted) triples.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.diff_2_kgcl_triple_annotation.get_type
documentation: TODO: factor these out in some kind of utility library

classes.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.diff_2_kgcl_triple_annotation.TripleAnnotationChangeSummary
documentation: Dataclass holding information about triple annotation axioms.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.summary_generation.render_non_deterministic_diff
documentation: a non-deterministic diff consists of a list of tuples.
A tuple contains two sets of triples that are involved in the non-deterministic diff

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.render_operations.render_entity
documentation:
Render entity based on rdf type.

```
param entity

entity to be rendered.

param rdf_type

type of RDF ["uri", "label", "literal]
```
TODO: replace this with rdflib methods

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.pretty_print_kgcl.get_labels
documentation: Return a map from IRIs in a graph to (a set of) labels.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.pretty_print_kgcl.render_instances
documentation:
Return patch with IRIs replaced by CURIEs.

Takes a KGCL patch for a graph and
returns a more readable patch
in which IRI's are replaced by CURIEs and labels where possible.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.pretty_print_kgcl.has_label
documentation: Return the label for an entity if it exists and the entity itself otherwise.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.pretty_print_kgcl.curie_entity
documentation: Return the CURIE for an entity if it exists and the entity itself otherwise.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.pretty_print_kgcl.render_entity
documentation: Return an encoding of the given entity using either a CURIE, a label, a literal, or a URI.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.change_detection.id_generator
documentation: Return a new ID for KGCL change operations.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.change_detection.detect_renamings
documentation:
Detect NodeRename instances and associated triples.

Given a diff represented by 'added' and 'deleted' triples,
return an encoding in terms of
(i) NodeRename instances,
(ii) triples involved in (i), and
(iii) nondeterministic choices.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.change_detection.detect_annotation_changes
documentation:
Detect annotation changes.

```
param added

Added node.

param deleted

Deleted node.

param new_annotations

new annotations.

param old_annotations

old annotations.

return

Tuple(kgcl, covered, non_deterministic)
```

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.change_detection.detect_node_moves
documentation:
Detect NodeMove and associated triples.

Given a diff represented by 'added' and 'deleted' triples,
return an encoding in terms of
(i) NodeMove instances,
(ii) triples involved in (i), and
(iii) nondeterministic choices.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.change_detection.detect_predicate_changes
documentation:
Detect PredicateChange and associated triples.

Given a diff represented by 'added' and 'deleted' triples,
return an encoding in terms of
(i) PredicateChange instances,
(ii) triples involved in (i), and
(iii) nondeterministic choices.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.graph_diff.get_added_thin_triples
documentation:
Retuns triples present in g2 but not g1.

Given two graphs g1 and g2,
returns triples (without blank nodes) that are in g2 but not g1,
i.e. 'added' triples.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.graph_diff.get_deleted_thin_triples
documentation:
Get triples in graph1 that aren't in Graph2.

Given two graphs g1 and g2,
returns triples (without blank nodes) that are in g1 but not g2,
i.e. 'deleted' triples.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.graph_diff.get_added_subsumptions
documentation:
Return atomic subsumption axioms in Graph2 not in Graph1.

Given two graphs g1 and g2,
returns atomic subsumption axioms that are in g2 but not g1,
i.e. 'added' subsumptions.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.graph_diff.get_deleted_subsumptions
documentation:
Return atomic subsumption axioms in Graph1 but not Graph2.

Given two graphs g1 and g2,
returns atomic subsumption axioms that are in g1 but not g2,
i.e. 'deleted' subsumptions.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.graph_diff.get_added_existentials
documentation:
Return ExistentialRestrictions in Graph2 but not in Graph1.

Given two graphs g1 and g2,
returns ExistentialRestrictions that are in g2 but not g1,
i.e. 'added' ExistentialRestrictions.
NB: this returns a set of 'ExistentialRestrictions' (defined in owlstar_sublanguage)

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.graph_diff.get_deleted_existentials
documentation:
Return ExistentialRestrictions from Graph1 not in Graph2.

Given two graphs g1 and g2,
returns ExistentialRestrictions that are in g1 but not g2,
i.e. 'deleted' ExistentialRestrictions.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.graph_diff.get_added_triple_annotations
documentation:
Return ExistentialRestrictions in Graph1 not in Graph2.

Given two graphs g1 and g2,
returns ExistentialRestrictions that are in g2 but not g1,
i.e. 'added' ExistentialRestrictions.
NB this returns a set of 'TripleAnnotation's (defined in owlstar_sublanguage)

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.graph_diff.get_deleted_triple_annotations
documentation:
Get TripleAnnotations from the two graphs provided.

Given two graphs g1 and g2,
returns TripleAnnotations that are in g1 but not g2,
i.e. 'deleted' ExistentialRestrictions.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.diff_2_kgcl_single.generate_thin_triple_commands
documentation:
Return graph differences.

Given two graphs g1 and g2,
return all KGCL data model instances to account for their diff.

classes.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.diff_2_kgcl_single.SingleTripleChangeSummary

methods.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.diff_2_kgcl_single.SingleTripleChangeSummary.get_commands
documentation:
Get commmands.

1. Synonym creations
2. Node moves
3. Predicate changes.
4. Renames
5. Class creations.
6. Subsumption creations
7. Annotation changes
Dataclass holding information about (atomic) existential restriction changes.

functions.name: kgcl_rdflib.diff.diff_2_kgcl_existential.generate_atomic_existential_commands
documentation:
Given two graphs g1 and g2.

return all edge creations and edge deletions.
